arts.ttl: Leicester vs Man Utd: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man Utd travel to Leicester in the Premier League on Sunday. Preview includes team news, predicted lineups, how to watch on TV and more.

arts.ttl: 'Like it or not' - Diogo Dalot opens up on Manchester United direction under Sir Jim Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Ineos have made sweeping changes at Man Utd in the 13 months they have had control of the club and not all of them have been popular.

arts.ttl: Man United 'end interest' in free agent signing as Premier League rivals handed transfer boost
arts.sum: Manchester United reportedly drop their interest in signing former youth product and current Lille midfielder Angel Gomes on a free transfer this summer.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd eye cut-price Raphinha deal; Liverpool plot £100m Alvarez bid
arts.sum: The latest transfer news, rumours and gossip circulating around the world.

arts.ttl: Van Nistelrooy hoping tactical tweak can revive Leicester's season
arts.sum: Leicester City are now nine points from safety and seemingly set to return to the Championship unless Ruud van Nistelrooy can turn things around – starting with the visit of his former club Manchester United on Sunday evening.

arts.ttl: Dalot Dalot sends strong message to Sir Jim Ratcliffe after overpaid jibe at Man Utd flops
arts.sum: Sir Jim Ratcliffe accused some members of Ruben Amorim’s squad of being overpaid and underperforming - and Diogo Dalot admitted his message has resonated strongly inside the dressing room

arts.ttl: Man Utd’s Quenda revenge as Arsenal ‘ADVANCED TALKS’ confirmed
arts.sum: Manchester United could inadvertently get revenge on Chelsea signing Quenda from under their noses as they are in talks with Real Madrid over a transfer for a €100 million star over a deal that could ruin the Blues’ plans. It may only be March but the transfer market is already hotting up thanks to Chelsea going early to sign Geovany Quenda from Sporting.

arts.ttl: Man Utd news: Manager confirms Paul Pogba talks as Sir Jim Ratcliffe admits mistake
arts.sum: Manchester United's part-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe has spoken once more about the club while questions remain over the future of United's record signing Paul Pogba

arts.ttl: Ratcliffe on Man Utd abuse - 'If it reached Glazer levels, I'd step down'
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe has lifted the lid on what has been just over a year of turbulence with INEOS in charge at Old Trafford.

arts.ttl: Abuse would lead me to walk away from Man Utd - Ratcliffe
arts.sum: Manchester United co-owner Sir Jim Ratcliffe says he would walk away if he gets "abused" by fans in the same way the Glazer family have.
